[2018-05-18 03:45] crash_overlord: @Sunfall basically smurfing isn't that big a problem unless it becomes overbearing. It seems pointless to punish/ban players when there's only 100 of them. (pre-early acces times). But on the otherhand, if someone is making smurfs specifically for the reason to "noob hunt" that's when it becomes bad enough to actually be bannable.
As we're still a small enough community, things can be handled on essentially a case-by-case basis but I do believe lunarch will take an anti all smurfs stand in the future
